mapper.sql: id, user_id, seat_id, reservation_id, rating, content, tags, is_anonymous, status, helpful_count, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM review WHERE seat_id = #{seatId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM review WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM review WHERE seat_id = #{seatId} AND status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT AVG(rating) FROM review WHERE seat_id = #{seatId} AND status = 'APPROVED'
SELECT FROM review ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (user_id, seat_id, reservation_id, rating, content, tags, is_anonymous, status, helpful_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{seatId}, #{reservationId}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{tags}, #{isAnonymous}, #{status}, #{helpfulCount}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET user_id = #{userId}, seat_id = #{seatId}, reservation_id = #{reservationId}, rating = #{rating}, content = #{content}, tags = #{tags}, is_anonymous = #{isAnonymous}, status = #{status}, helpful_count = #{helpfulCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
